arts.ttl: How Dani Olmo could cost €168m and send Barcelona into crisis
arts.sum: Barcelona have been placed in a state of crisis over Dani Olmo ’s registration, which threatens to cost the club millions if it is not resolved in their favour. Should Barca fail to register Dani Olmo, it is a move that could cost the club €168 million.
